name: python3-pyspnego
title: python3-pyspnego
summary: Windows Negotiate Authentication Client and Server
description:
Windows Negotiate Authentication Client and Server
Library to handle SPNEGO (Negotiate, NTLM, Kerberos) and CredSSP
authentication. Also includes a packet parser that can be used to decode raw
NTLM/SPNEGO/Kerberos tokens into a human readable format.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for pyspnego-parse.
arguments.raw: -parse  Option present in package usage line for pyspnego-parse.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyspnego-parse because Windows Negotiate Authentication Client and Server.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyspnego-parse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyspnego-parse [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pyspnego-parse.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyspnego-parse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyspnego-parse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -parse
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for pyspnego-parse.
